name: GOLFTEC Westshore
address: 4142 W Boy Scout Blvd, Tampa, FL 33607
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf instruction and fitting center focused on player improvement through technology. Utilizing advanced motion measurement systems like OPTIMOTION and high-speed cameras, certified PGA coaches analyze swing mechanics and provide personalized feedback. The center offers lessons, club fittings, and practice access, catering to golfers seeking structured skill development and performance optimization.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis with OPTIMOTION motion capture technology
Certified PGA coaches providing data-backed instruction
Launch monitors provide real-time club and ball flight metrics
Personalized improvement plans based on swing evaluations
Custom club fitting with equipment from top brands

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings. You may use your own clubs during sessions if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are available at GOLFTEC locations. The focus is on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Virtual play time depends on the number of holes and simulator software used. Individual play typically takes 20-30 minutes per hole.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and coaching suitable for young golfers, though specific age requirements may vary by location.
